response:
SELECT a.abbreviation,
       a.country
FROM   airlines AS a
LEFT JOIN flights AS f
       ON f.airline_id = a.airline_id
GROUP  BY a.airline_id,
          a.abbreviation,
          a.country
HAVING COUNT(f.flight_id) = (
       SELECT MIN(flight_cnt)
       FROM (
            SELECT COUNT(f2.flight_id) AS flight_cnt
            FROM   airlines AS a2
            LEFT JOIN flights AS f2
                   ON f2.airline_id = a2.airline_id
            GROUP  BY a2.airline_id
       ) AS sub );
